Free printable · from The Cardinal's Toolkit

The first week of caregiving, made a little lighter.

When you suddenly become someone's caregiver, no one hands you a map. This free, one-page Caregiver's First-Week Checklist gives you just enough to get through — without dropping what matters most.

  • ✅ The handful of things to do right away
  • ✅ What to set up this week (and what can wait)
  • ✅ The questions worth asking the care team
  • ✅ A gentle reminder to care for you, too

Get it free

Enter your email and we'll send the checklist — plus the occasional gentle note. Unsubscribe any time.

We'll only email you about the books and caregiving resources. Your address is never sold or shared.

“You will not do this perfectly, and that is not the same as doing it wrong. Showing up is the work.” — The Cardinal's Toolkit

Prefer to peek first? You can read the checklist here — but join the list to keep it and get more like it.
